---
title: "Tools"
---

The AI4SoilHealth Toolbox includes field methods, laboratory approaches, digital tools, and supporting services. Each tool contributes differently to soil health assessment.

Some tools are suited to **rapid screening in the field**. Others provide **deeper laboratory analysis**. Digital tools help users **record, visualise, compare, and report** soil health information.

## Digital tools and services

<div class="tool-grid">
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/digital/app-home.png" alt="AI4SoilHealth app" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="ai4sh-app.qmd">AI4SoilHealth App</a></h3>
    <p>Main user-facing environment for viewing, recording, and interacting with soil health information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/digital/shdc-cover.png" alt="Soil Health Data Cube" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="data-cube.qmd">Soil Health Data Cube</a></h3>
    <p>Supporting digital service that provides contextual maps, layers, and background information.</p>
  </div>
</div>

## Field tools and rapid assessment methods

<div class="tool-grid">
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/toolbox-collage.png" alt="Soil spectroscopy" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="soil-spectroscopy.qmd">Soil Spectroscopy</a></h3>
    <p>Rapid, non-destructive assessment of several physicochemical soil properties.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/toolbox-collage.png" alt="VESS" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="vess.qmd">VESS</a></h3>
    <p>Visual evaluation of soil structure directly in the field.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/toolbox-collage.png" alt="Aggregate stability" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="aggregate-stability.qmd">Aggregate Stability</a></h3>
    <p>Simple methods for assessing structural stability and slaking behaviour.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/infiltration-field.png" alt="Infiltration test" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="infiltration.qmd">Infiltration Test</a></h3>
    <p>Field method to assess how water enters the soil and how the soil behaves hydraulically.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/toolbox-collage.png" alt="Salinity, pH and EC methods" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="salinity-ph-ec.qmd">Salinity / pH / EC Methods</a></h3>
    <p>Rapid screening methods for salinity, acidity, and related chemical conditions.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/macrofauna-image.png" alt="Macrofauna observation" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="macrofauna.qmd">Macrofauna Observation</a></h3>
    <p>Observation-based assessment of earthworms and other visible soil fauna.</p>
  </div>
</div>

## Laboratory and detailed assessment methods

<div class="tool-grid">
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/record-sheet.png" alt="Standard laboratory analysis" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="lab-analysis.qmd">Standard Soil Laboratory Analysis</a></h3>
    <p>Reference measurements for key soil physicochemical variables.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/record-sheet.png" alt="Bulk density" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="bulk-density.qmd">Bulk Density Sampling</a></h3>
    <p>Sampling approach that supports structure, compaction, and stock-related assessment.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/digit-soil-reader.png" alt="SEAR or Digit Soil" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="sear.qmd">SEAR / Digit Soil</a></h3>
    <p>Rapid measurement of extracellular enzyme activity linked to soil biological functioning.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/microbiometer-kit.png" alt="MicroBIOMETER" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="microbiometer.qmd">MicroBIOMETER</a></h3>
    <p>Kit-based method for estimating microbial biomass and fungal/bacterial balance.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-card">
    <img src="../images/tools/toolbox-collage.png" alt="eDNA or metabarcoding" class="card-thumb">
    <h3><a href="edna.qmd">eDNA / Metabarcoding</a></h3>
    <p>DNA-based workflow for soil biodiversity and biological community assessment.</p>
  </div>
</div>

## How to use this catalogue

Each tool page explains:

- what the tool is,
- why a user would use it,
- where it is used,
- which target variables it addresses,
- which soil health descriptors it supports,
- and what kind of output a user can expect.
